scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules && npm install
scripts.build: turbo run build && npm run build:custom -w nextjs-app
scripts.lint: turbo run lint && npm run graphql:lint
scripts.playwright: npm run playwright:normal && npm run playwright:custom && npm run playwright:tanstack
scripts.playwright:normal: eval "$(node scripts/portless-env.mjs shell)" && BASE_URL=${BASE_URL} npm run test -w @obs-playground/playwright-tests
scripts.playwright:custom: eval "$(node scripts/portless-env.mjs shell)" && BASE_URL=${CUSTOM_URL} npm run test -w @obs-playground/playwright-tests
scripts.playwright:tanstack: eval "$(node scripts/portless-env.mjs shell)" && BASE_URL=${TANSTACK_URL} npm run test -w @obs-playground/playwright-tests
scripts.playwright:slow: eval "$(node scripts/portless-env.mjs shell)" && BASE_URL=${BASE_URL} SLOW_TESTS=true npm run test -w @obs-playground/playwright-tests
